meta.title: Home | South Carolina | Carolina Dental Alliance
meta.description: Carolina Dental Alliance is a dentist with offices in Spartanburg, Greenville, Columbia and other parts of South Carolina.

secciones.contenido: From the standard dental checkup to restorative procedures, our team is here for you and your family.
Our many dentists at our South Carolina practices have the skills to provide expert care with a gentle touch.
Braces starting at $3,995 with Novus Orthodontics. Free consultation including initial exam and X-rays.
Our commitment is to our patients, and we strive to make sure they are comfortable throughout their entire appointment.

secciones.titulo: Compassionate Dental Care Is Right Around The Corner
secciones.contenido: From Upstate South Carolina to the Coast, the friendly dentists and dental professionals at Carolina Dental Alliance practices are dedicated to providing you with exceptional dental care in a relaxed, comfortable atmosphere. We love to see those beautiful Carolina smiles, so we make it easy for you to get the dental care you need to keep your smile brighter, healthier and happier for a lifetime. No matter which of our 17 practices you visit, you'll find a caring team of professionals, equipped with the latest in dental technology, ready to care for your dental needs. They'll answer any questions, explain all of your options and provide the information you need to be better informed and more relaxed. All of the dental professionals at Carolina Dental Alliance maintain the highest levels of accreditation and pursue ongoing education to stay abreast of the latest trends in dentistry.
To make your visit even easier, we accept and file most traditional insurance and even have payment options.
Sedation Dentistry, Maxillofacial & Oral Surgery, TMJ Treatment, Teeth Whitening, Dentures, Implants, Crowns, Bridges, Veneers

Beaufort, Charleston, Columbia, Blacksburg, Greenville, Greenwood, Inman, Liberty, Murrells Inlet, Piedmont, Powdersville, Saluda, Spartanburg Eastside, Spartanburg Powell Mill Road, Spartanburg Westside, Summerville, Union
